Wu Thirteen Minutes Thesis.pdf.title: The Impossibility of Alex Wu's Thirteen-Minute Reading Claim
Wu Thirteen Minutes Thesis.pdf.description: A rigorous multidisciplinary thesis debunking the claim that Alex Wu read a 2.5-million-word document in 13 minutes, using optics, neurophysiology, and information theory.

elegy-of-the-mandate.pdf.title: 天命輓歌 · Elegy of the Mandate
elegy-of-the-mandate.pdf.description: An original bilingual Chinese epic braiding the Iliad, the Three Kingdoms, Dream of the Red Chamber, and Gilgamesh — a fallen house, a war over a stolen jade Mandate-seal, sworn-brother oaths, a journey to wrest immortality from Heaven, and the garden-lady who records it all. Vertical 竖排 Chinese faces an English translation, set as a classical 古籍 woodblock edition with 脂批 commentary.

toc.title: 第一回 桃林結義 玄圭出世
第二回 天樞失璽 九土鼎沸
第三回 朱華秋讌 詩讖先成
第四回 璟同折旗 蠻山夜語
第五回 義帥蒙讒 怒臥空帳
第六回 代袍陷陣 萬靈坡折
第七回 問罪燈前 昭明垂淚
第八回 西行問鬼 忘川授路
第九回 不死之淵 玄母示價
第十回 朱華傾頹 輓歌一夢
